word: G5448 - φυσιόω - physióō - foo-see-o'-o - Puff up

sections.paragraph:
- Original: φυσιόω

- Transliteration: Phusioo

- Phonetic: foo-see-o'-o

- Definition:

1. to make natural, to cause a thing to pass into nature

2. to inflate, blow up, to cause to swell up

a. to puff up, make proud

b. to be puffed up, to bear one's self loftily, be proud

- Origin: from G5449 in the primary sense of blowing

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G5449 in the primary sense of blowing; to inflate that is (figuratively) make proud (haughty): - puff up.
